---
name: Spec discrepancy
about: Report a technical mismatch between the lab and EMVCo or other cited public material
title: "[Spec] "
labels: ["citation-layer"]
assignees: []
---

## Current behavior

What the app or docs currently say.

## Expected behavior

What should change.

## Requirement anchor

List the EMVCo requirement ID, section number, or exact public source that grounds the correction.

## Affected area

- [ ] Flow logic
- [ ] Scenario preset
- [ ] Message explanation
- [ ] Glossary
- [ ] Version note
- [ ] Vendor crosswalk

## Version scope

- [ ] 2.1.0
- [ ] 2.2.0
- [ ] 2.3.1

## Evidence

Paste the relevant quoted text or summarize it precisely.

## Optional screenshots

Add screenshots if the discrepancy is visible in the UI.
